description.en:
Green Horizon Industries introduces Industrial Hemp to Farming Simulator 25.
Phase 2.8 test build: the mod loads clean, hemp fill types are active again, and greenhouse store placement remains paused while the original Blender greenhouse model and real Green Horizon .i3d export are finished.

text.name: function_ghi_hempGreenhouse
text.en: Grows industrial hemp from water and hemp seed.
